src_embedding_text: source: design test case id: tc-datamanager-001 title: test datamanager create, read, update, delete operations module: datamanager source files or pages: 1 covered methods: preconditions: system is initialized with a datamanager instance test data: - id: 1, name: "test plant 1" - id: 2, name: "test plant 2" - id: 3, name: "test plant 3" - id: 4, name: "test diary 1" - id: 5, name: "test diary 2" test steps: 1. call the create() method on datamanager for plant 1 with valid data 2. call the create() method on datamanager for plant 2 with valid data 3. call the create() method on datamanager for plant 3 with valid data 4. call the create() method on datamanager for diary 1 with valid data 5. call the create() method on datamanager for diary 2 with valid data 6. call the read() method on datamanager to get all created plants 7. call the read() method on datamanager to get all created diaries 8. call the update() method on datamanager for plant 1 with updated name "test plant 1 updated" 9. call the update() method on datamanager for plant 2 with updated name "test plant 2 updated" 10. call the update() method on datamanager for plant 3 with updated name "test plant 3 updated" 11. call the read() method on datamanager to verify the updated names for plants 1, 2, and 3 12. call the delete() method on datamanager for plant 1 13. call the delete() method on datamanager for plant 2 14. call the delete() method on datamanager for plant 3 15. call the read() method on datamanager to verify that plants 1, 2, and 3 are no longer present 16. call the read() method on datamanager to verify that diaries 1 and 2 are still present expected result: - all create() calls should be successful - all read() calls should return the created plants and diaries - all update() calls should be successful and update the names accordingly - all delete() calls should remove the plants from the datamanager - the read() call after deleting the plants should not return them - the read() call after deleting the plants should still return the diaries unit: project:
